hooks.command:
echo '## FTWNOW Plugin Active

FTWNOW full-stack development methodology is loaded.

- Use `/FTW <project-name>` to activate a project
- Use `/FTW <project-name> "task description"` to start a new task
- All development follows Phase 0-7 with 16 Agents and 3 Hard Gates
- Say "FTW" to unlock execution after PLAN mode'
